summary: Tuesday afternoon, ~3h to close. Bankroll $10,000, still 100% cash (0/3 day-trades). Tape is decisively risk-on (SPY/QQQ at new highs, SMH +4.65%, INTC +8%, TSLA +3%) but every candidate fails the checklist: semis/INTC are already-moved near HOD (chasing into a Thu earnings binary), GOOGL/TSLA are Wed-close coin-flips with no edge, and SPY/QQQ just tracks my benchmark. Held cash, dodging activity bias and chasing; preserving dry powder for the post-earnings overshoot window (GOOGL/TSLA Thu, INTC Fri) where a catalyst gives a real edge.
